name: io.github.dumbspacecookie/stickies
description: Persistent, expiring, importance-graded sticky notes for Claude Code.

environmentVariables.name: STICKIES_DISCORD_WEBHOOK
environmentVariables.description: Optional Discord webhook URL to mirror sticky lifecycle events.

environmentVariables.name: STICKIES_SYNC_REPO
environmentVariables.description: Path to a git clone you own, used as the opt-in cross-machine sync store.
